questions.question: Which is listed as a reason for studying concepts of programming languages?

choices.D: Removal of the need for documentation

questions.question: Which programming domain is associated with large numbers of floating point computations and use of arrays?
Which language is listed under business applications?
Which language is listed under artificial intelligence?
Which evaluation criterion refers to the ease with which programs can be read and understood?
Which evaluation criterion includes training programmers, writing programs, executing programs, and maintaining programs?
Under readability, which item is listed as part of overall simplicity?
Which readability factor states that a relatively small set of primitive constructs can be combined in a relatively small number of ways?
Which writability factor is described as the ability to define and use complex structures or operations in ways that allow details to be ignored?
Which reliability factor involves testing for type errors?
Portability is defined as what?

choices.A: The ease of learning new languages
choices.B: The completeness of the official definition
choices.C: The ability to define complex structures
choices.D: The ease with which programs can be moved from one implementation to another

questions.question: Which is listed as an influence on language design?
In the von Neumann architecture, where are data and programs stored?
In the fetch-execute cycle, what happens after fetching the instruction pointed by the counter?
Which language category is described as rule-based with rules specified in no particular order?
Which language is listed as an example of a logic language?
Which trade-off example states that APL provides many powerful operators but at the cost of poor readability?
In compilation, which phase converts characters in the source program into lexical units?
Which statement about pure interpretation is listed in Lesson 1?

choices.A: It always requires compilation to machine code
choices.B: It is faster than compiled programs
choices.D: It replaces the need for an interpreter

questions.question: What does a preprocessor do according to the lesson?

choices.A: Optimizes machine code at run time
choices.D: Expands embedded preprocessor macros before compilation
